movie.actors: Tommy Lee Jones, Anne Heche, Gaby Hoffmann, Don Cheadle
movie.plot: Something unspeakably chilling is ultimately starting to heat up at The City of Los Angeles! Beneath the famed La Brea Tar Pits, a raging volcano has formed, raining a storm of deadly fire bombs and an endless tide of white-hot lava upon the stunned city!
movie.title: Volcano
movie.writer: Jerome Armstrong (story), Jerome Armstrong (screenplay), Billy Ray (screenplay)
